title: SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER - 211info
text: ESTACADA HIGH SCHOOL SBHC SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Services include routine physical exams, sports physicals; treatment of illness and injury; vision, and blood pressure screenings; immunizations; mental health services; age-appropriate reproductive health; routine lab tests; prescription medication maintenance; and health, fitness, and nutrition education and promotion. 535 NE 6th Avenue Estacada, OR 97023 Eligibility: Estacada School District students Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Thursday/Friday 8:30am-noon and 1pm-5pm, Tuesday 8:30am-noon and 1pm-7pm Email (503) 630-8550 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 630-8550 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurances. Sliding scale fees available. Students will not be turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information for those applying for sliding scale fees. AREA SERVED: Lane and Clackamas Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located in the Estacada High School parking lot. Services: Childhood Immunization Mental Health Evaluation * Grade School Students Sports Participation Physical Examinations Student Health Programs Vaccine Information If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ESTACADA HIGH SCHOOL SBHC
